sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47077" key="h(midoulei/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμι-δουλεία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n47077.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">half-slavery</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1264.tlg001:2:284" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Chrysipp.Stoic.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.284</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
